reforms.description: The Federal Government announced the foundation of an Innovation Agency to promote research and development activities.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The establishment of an Innovation Agency is expected to enhance R&D activities, thereby supporting economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The Innovation Agency has been established and is operational.
reforms.importance_rationale: The foundation of an Innovation Agency represents a significant structural change in the innovation landscape.
reforms.source_quote: Further measures included: foundation of an Innovation Agency.

reforms.description: The government announced an extension of the interest rate subsidy scheme for 'innovative' investments, covering a wider range of activities.
reforms.component_name: Extension of Interest Rate Subsidy Scheme
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Extending the interest rate subsidy scheme is likely to incentivize private sector investments in innovation, thus fostering economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The interest rate subsidy scheme has been extended and is currently in effect.
reforms.importance_rationale: The extension of the subsidy scheme is a significant but narrower reform aimed at enhancing private investment in innovation.
reforms.source_quote: Extension of the interest rate subsidy scheme for 'innovative' investment to cover a wider range of activities.
